zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth於1620年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其。她於大約1643年與Richard Cutter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1662年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于1620年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其。她于大约1643年与Richard Cutter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1662年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born in 1620, in Norwich, Norfolk, England. She married Richard Cutter about 1643, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 March 1662, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは1620年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた。約1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジでRichard Cutterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1662年3月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジで42歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Cambridge, Massachusetts Bay, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 캄브리지
ko.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 1620년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 Richard Cutter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 3월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu em 1620, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Cutter aproximadamente 1643, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de março de 1662, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась в 1620 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Cutter около 1643 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 марта 1662 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nació en 1620, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Cutter aproximadamente 1643, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1662, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
